questions.q: Who directed the 1992 Tamil film Roja?
questions.explanation: Roja was written and directed by Mani Ratnam, released in 1992.

questions.q: Which composer made his feature film debut with the 1992 film Roja?
questions.explanation: Roja marked the feature film scoring debut of A. R. Rahman.

questions.q: In which year was the Tamil film Roja originally released?
questions.explanation: Roja was released in 1992.

questions.q: In which Indian region is the husband abducted by militants in the film Roja?
questions.explanation: In Roja, the husband is abducted by militants in Kashmir.

questions.q: What is the profession of the abducted husband in the film Roja?
questions.explanation: The husband Rishi Kumar is a cryptographer working for the government.

questions.q: What does the title 'Roja' translate to in English?
questions.explanation: 'Roja' means 'rose', and it is also the name of the film's female protagonist.

questions.q: Which actress played the title role of Roja in the 1992 film?
questions.explanation: Madhoo played the title character Roja in the film.

questions.q: Which actor played the cryptographer husband Rishi Kumar in the film Roja?
questions.explanation: Arvind Swamy played Rishi Kumar, the cryptographer husband, in Roja.

questions.q: In which language was the film Roja originally made?
questions.explanation: Roja was originally made in Tamil and later dubbed into other languages.

questions.q: A. R. Rahman won which major Indian honour for his music in the film Roja?
questions.explanation: Rahman won the National Film Award for Best Music Direction for Roja.

questions.q: Which lyricist wrote the Tamil songs for the 1992 film Roja?
questions.explanation: Vairamuthu wrote the Tamil lyrics for the songs in Roja.

questions.q: Which song from the film Roja is a patriotic number rendered in Hindi as 'Bharat Humko Jaan Se Pyaara'?
questions.explanation: 'Tamizha Tamizha' is the patriotic song from Roja, rendered as 'Bharat Humko Jaan Se Pyaara' in Hindi.

questions.q: Which cinematographer shot the visually striking landscapes of the film Roja?
questions.explanation: Santosh Sivan was the cinematographer for Roja.

questions.q: The popular song 'Chinna Chinna Aasai' from Roja was sung in Tamil by which playback singer?
questions.explanation: 'Chinna Chinna Aasai' was sung by Minmini, one of the film's breakout tracks.

questions.q: Roja was the first film in which thematic trilogy of films by Mani Ratnam dealing with India's political turmoil?
questions.explanation: Roja is considered the first of Mani Ratnam's 'terrorism trilogy', followed by Bombay and Dil Se.

questions.q: Which two films completed Mani Ratnam's loosely connected trilogy that began with Roja?
questions.explanation: Bombay (1995) and Dil Se (1998) completed the trilogy that began with Roja.

questions.q: The film Roja was dubbed into Hindi; which singer recorded the Hindi version of the patriotic song 'Bharat Humko Jaan Se Pyaara'?
questions.explanation: Hariharan sang the Hindi version 'Bharat Humko Jaan Se Pyaara Hai' for the dubbed release.

questions.q: In the film Roja, why does the title character travel from her village to the city before the Kashmir journey?
options: To find work as a nurse
Following her marriage to Rishi Kumar
questions.explanation: Roja moves to the city after marrying Rishi Kumar, who then takes a posting that leads them to Kashmir.

questions.q: Roja received which National Film Award honouring it as a film promoting national values?
options: Best Feature Film on National Integration (Nargis Dutt Award)
questions.explanation: Roja won the Nargis Dutt Award for Best Feature Film on National Integration.

questions.q: Time magazine later included the soundtrack of Roja in which of its lists?
questions.explanation: Time magazine ranked the Roja soundtrack among its '10 Best Soundtracks' of all time in a 2005 list.

questions.q: The song 'Pudhu Vellai Mazhai' in the film Roja is picturised on which situation?
options: The couple's romantic union after marriage
questions.explanation: 'Pudhu Vellai Mazhai' is a romantic song picturised on the newlywed couple.

questions.q: Who composed the background score and all the songs for the 1992 film Roja?
questions.explanation: A. R. Rahman composed both the songs and the background score for Roja.

questions.q: On which day in 1992 was the Tamil film Roja originally released in theatres?
questions.explanation: Roja was released on 15 August 1992, coinciding with India's Independence Day.

questions.q: Madhoo, who played the title role in Roja, is a relative of which veteran Hindi film actress?
questions.explanation: Madhoo is related to Hema Malini; her father was Hema Malini's uncle, making the two cousins.

questions.q: A. R. Rahman's National Film Award for Best Music Direction for Roja was notable because of what?
options: He won two awards in one year
He was the youngest recipient at age 18
He won it for his very first feature film score
questions.explanation: Rahman won the National Award for Best Music Direction with Roja, his debut feature film score.

questions.q: Roja was later dubbed and released in Hindi in 1995; this widened the film's reach to which audience?
questions.explanation: The 1995 Hindi-dubbed release brought Roja and Rahman's music to a pan-Indian Hindi-speaking audience.

questions.q: In the film Roja, what is the name of the militant (played by Pankaj Kapur) who directly holds Rishi Kumar captive?
questions.explanation: Liaqat, played by Pankaj Kapur, is the militant who holds Rishi captive; Wasim Khan is the jailed separatist leader the group wants freed.

questions.q: Roja's success was a milestone in establishing which film score approach that Rahman pioneered in his home studio?
options: An extensive blend of digital and electronic synthesis with acoustic sound
questions.explanation: Rahman's Roja score showcased his pioneering blend of digital, electronic and acoustic sounds produced in his studio.

questions.q: The film Roja is set against the backdrop of which real-world conflict of the early 1990s?
questions.explanation: Roja is set against the backdrop of the Kashmir insurgency of the early 1990s.

questions.q: Which earlier Mani Ratnam crime drama, scored by Ilaiyaraaja before the Rahman era, is paired with Roja as a landmark of his Tamil filmography?
questions.explanation: Nayakan (1987), scored by Ilaiyaraaja, is the earlier Mani Ratnam landmark preceding the Rahman era that began with Roja.
